objective: Validate UTMI+ link attach reset chirp and standard enumeration to configured state.
stimulus_summary: Run existing USB init flow from link enable through GET_DESCRIPTOR SET_ADDRESS and SET_CONFIGURATION.
success_measurement: VIP link enabled; device addressed/configured; no UVM_ERROR; MCU pass mailbox if firmware participates.
spec_source_traceability: USB 2.0 sec 7.1.7.5, ch9; OCP v1.1 sec 8.5 lines 60-74

objective: Check device descriptor fields and composite-device class policy.
stimulus_summary: GET_DESCRIPTOR(Device) at address 0 and address 1; decode bDeviceClass/SubClass/Protocol and EP0 max packet size.
success_measurement: Descriptor fields match expected values; EP0 max packet size legal for HS control endpoint.

objective: Check configuration descriptor includes exactly one OCP recovery interface and functional descriptor.
stimulus_summary: Read config descriptor in two stages using wTotalLength; parse all descriptors.
success_measurement: Interface class 0xEF subclass 0x08 protocol 0x01 bNumEndpoints 0; functional descriptor present once; IAD policy checked or explicitly waived for this descriptor set.

objective: Validate Interface Association Descriptor policy for strict composite-device enumeration.
stimulus_summary: Parse configuration descriptor for IAD if device exposes composite functions that require grouping; otherwise record explicit no-IAD waiver for single-interface recovery descriptor.
success_measurement: IAD fields are correct when required, or waiver states why current recovery-only descriptor does not need IAD.
spec_source_traceability: USB 2.0 descriptor framework; OCP v1.1 sec 8.5.4

objective: Validate device responds at new address only after SET_ADDRESS status stage.
stimulus_summary: Issue SET_ADDRESS then immediate old/new address probes around status completion.
success_measurement: Old address no longer responds after status; new address responds; no premature address switch.

objective: Validate OCP commands are unavailable before configured state and available after configured state.
stimulus_summary: Attempt OCP PROT_CAP before SET_CONFIGURATION then after SET_CONFIGURATION.
success_measurement: Pre-configured command stalls or non-success gracefully; post-configured PROT_CAP succeeds.
spec_source_traceability: OCP v1.1 sec 8.5 lines 73-76; USB 2.0 ch9 device states

objective: Validate EP0 IN data packetization over multiple packets.
stimulus_summary: Request configuration descriptor or OCP read larger than one max packet where supported.
success_measurement: All DATA packets max size except final; payload length and data match expected.
spec_source_traceability: USB 2.0 sec 5.5.3/5.5.5; OCP v1.1 sec 8.5 lines 41-51
dependencies: Descriptor/OCP payload larger than 64B or synthetic descriptor variant

objective: Validate EP0 OUT data packetization for OCP writes at max transfer size.
stimulus_summary: Write INDIRECT_FIFO_DATA with wLength equal to wMaxWrTransferSize.
success_measurement: All data bytes observed; FIFO WRITE_INDEX advances by wLength rounded to dwords.
spec_source_traceability: USB 2.0 sec 5.5; OCP v1.1 sec 8.5.1 and 9.2 INDIRECT_FIFO_DATA

objective: Validate short packet and ZLP handling for final DATA packet where legal.
stimulus_summary: Drive control transfers that terminate with short packet and zero-length status/data as applicable.
success_measurement: Transfer completes without timeout; payload length interpretation correct.
spec_source_traceability: USB 2.0 sec 5.5.5; OCP v1.1 sec 8.5 lines 49-51
dependencies: VIP support for ZLP/short packet constraints

objective: Validate STALL recovery via CLEAR_FEATURE or legal EP0 recovery path.
stimulus_summary: Issue invalid request to generate STALL; issue CLEAR_FEATURE/next SETUP recovery; retry PROT_CAP.
success_measurement: Mandatory OCP command succeeds after recovery; no deadlock.
spec_source_traceability: USB 2.0 sec 8.5.3.4 and ch9; OCP v1.1 sec 8.5.5
dependencies: VIP API prototype for EP0 STALL clear

objective: Validate USB bus reset after configured state forces clean re-enumeration.
stimulus_summary: Enumerate, run PROT_CAP, issue USB bus reset, enumerate again, run PROT_CAP again.
success_measurement: Second enumeration succeeds; OCP accessible only after reconfiguration; stale address/config cleared.

objective: Validate surprise removal while idle after configuration.
stimulus_summary: Enumerate, idle, disconnect host/device PHY, reconnect, re-enumerate.
success_measurement: No UVM hang; reconnect reaches configured state; OCP PROT_CAP succeeds after re-enum.

objective: Validate surprise removal during EP0 control transfer.
stimulus_summary: Disconnect during SETUP/DATA/STATUS phase across separate seeds or directed phase controls.
success_measurement: Transfer reports non-success; device recovers after reconnect/reset without stale state.

objective: Validate invalid standard request is rejected gracefully.
stimulus_summary: Send unsupported standard request or illegal recipient while configured.
success_measurement: STALL/non-success observed; subsequent legal GET_DESCRIPTOR and PROT_CAP succeed.

objective: Validate interrupted SETUP phase does not corrupt EP0/OCP state.
stimulus_summary: Abort or corrupt SETUP for standard and OCP class requests.
success_measurement: Device returns to accepting next valid SETUP after reset/retry; no false command side effects.

objective: Validate unexpected PID or DATA0/DATA1 toggle error handling.
stimulus_summary: Inject wrong data toggle/PID during control DATA stage.
success_measurement: VIP/DUT detect non-success; mandatory commands recover after retry or reset.

objective: Validate CRC/data packet error handling if VIP can inject it.
stimulus_summary: Inject CRC/data error during control OUT and control IN transfers.
success_measurement: Transfer non-success; no stale FIFO write for failed OUT; recovery path works.
spec_source_traceability: USB 2.0 sec 8; OCP v1.1 sec 8.5 lines 77-79

objective: Validate USB integration exposes all three AXI subordinate ports on subsystem AXI fabric.
stimulus_summary: Perform legal read/write smoke through each USB AXI-sub port at representative registers.
success_measurement: All three ports respond with expected data or documented access policy.
spec_source_traceability: User integration description; CaliptraSS integration AXI address map

objective: Validate USB/OCP recovery register reset values after subsystem reset and USB bus reset if applicable.
stimulus_summary: Read reset values before init, after subsystem reset, and after USB bus reset.
success_measurement: Register reset values match RDL/implementation expectations.

objective: Validate removed CMS-memory-window addresses and reserved addresses behave as specified.
stimulus_summary: Access prior INDIRECT_CTRL/STATUS/DATA window addresses and reserved offsets.
success_measurement: Access produces expected bus response or OCP protocol error path; no unintended state update.
spec_source_traceability: OCP v1.1 sec 9.1; recent R3 removal context

objective: Stress back-to-back AXI reads/writes to USB OCP registers.
stimulus_summary: Run bursts or tight single transactions to status/control/data registers.
success_measurement: No lost writes; clear-on-read fields clear exactly once; status stable.

objective: Validate byte-lane/partial write handling for USB OCP registers.
stimulus_summary: Write command/register fields using byte, halfword, and word strobes where legal.
success_measurement: Fields update per RDL policy; illegal partials rejected or documented.

objective: Validate functional descriptor transfer limits.
stimulus_summary: Parse OCP_RECOVERY_FUNCTIONAL descriptor fields wMaxWrTransferSize and wMaxRdTransferSize.
success_measurement: Both limits >=64 and equal expected implementation values; BCD version correct.

objective: Validate PROT_CAP magic version and FIFO-only capability bitmap.
stimulus_summary: Issue PROT_CAP read after configured state.
success_measurement: Magic OCP RECV, version 1.1, FIFO CMS supported, unsupported CMS-memory-window bit clear.

objective: Validate DEVICE_ID payload length and selected identifier fields.
stimulus_summary: Issue DEVICE_ID read and decode descriptor type/vendor fields.
success_measurement: Payload length >=24; fields match implementation constants or documented wildcard policy.

objective: Validate DEVICE_STATUS states across boot/recovery.
stimulus_summary: Read DEVICE_STATUS at idle, awaiting image, recovery pending, running/success/failure.
success_measurement: Observed byte0 sequence matches expected firmware state machine.

objective: Validate PROTOCOL_ERROR clear-on-read semantics.
stimulus_summary: Trigger unsupported command, read DEVICE_STATUS twice.
success_measurement: First read reports expected error; second reports no protocol error.

objective: Validate RECOVERY_STATUS status and image index through multi-stage recovery.
stimulus_summary: Poll RECOVERY_STATUS during Caliptra image, SoC manifest/config, MCU image stages.
success_measurement: Status and image index request each next stage correctly.
spec_source_traceability: OCP v1.1 sec 9.2 RECOVERY_STATUS; Caliptra.md streaming sequence

objective: Validate RECOVERY_CTRL CMS selection and activation value 0x0F.
stimulus_summary: Program CMS 0, transfer image, write activation 0x0F, then observe status/sideband.
success_measurement: image_activated asserted; RECOVERY_STATUS enters booting; activation clears per implementation.
spec_source_traceability: OCP v1.1 sec 9.2 RECOVERY_CTRL; Caliptra.md lines 1606-1616

objective: Validate RECOVERY_CTRL deactivate value 0x00 and reserved activation values.
stimulus_summary: Drive RECOVERY_CTRL activation sequence 0x00 to 0x0F to 0x00, then try reserved activation values.
success_measurement: 0x0F asserts image_activated; 0x00 deasserts or reports inactive per design; reserved values set unsupported-parameter protocol error without activation.
spec_source_traceability: OCP v1.1 sec 9.2 RECOVERY_CTRL; Caliptra.md lines 1606-1616
dependencies: Activation observable and expected reserved-value policy

objective: Validate HW_STATUS if advertised.
stimulus_summary: Read HW_STATUS under normal and injected HW status conditions if available.
success_measurement: Normal fields legal; injected temperature/soft/fatal bits reflected or unsupported if not advertised.

objective: Validate DEVICE_RESET supported fields if capability advertised.
stimulus_summary: Write device reset, management reset, forced recovery, and interface mastering encodings.
success_measurement: Supported commands take effect; unsupported encodings set protocol error.

objective: Validate VENDOR command support or unsupported policy.
stimulus_summary: Issue VENDOR read/write if advertised; otherwise issue and check unsupported behavior.
success_measurement: Supported payload follows vendor policy or DEVICE_STATUS.PROTOCOL_ERROR unsupported is set.

objective: Validate CMS count discovery and every advertised CMS index policy.
stimulus_summary: Read PROT_CAP CMS count, then select each advertised CMS in RECOVERY_CTRL or INDIRECT_FIFO_CTRL.
success_measurement: Supported CMS indices route to expected region/type; unsupported indices are rejected with invalid-CMS behavior.
spec_source_traceability: OCP v1.1 sec 9.2 PROT_CAP, RECOVERY_CTRL, INDIRECT_FIFO_CTRL

objective: Validate DEVICE_STATUS heartbeat, recovery reason, and vendor-status length fields, not only byte0 state.
stimulus_summary: Poll DEVICE_STATUS during idle and long image drain; decode bytes 2-6 and any vendor-status payload.
success_measurement: Recovery reason is populated only in states that require it; heartbeat increments or documented unsupported value is stable; vendor length matches payload.

objective: Validate reserved command code handling.
stimulus_summary: Issue class transfer with command outside 0x22-0x2F.
success_measurement: Transfer STALL/non-success or protocol error per design; subsequent DEVICE_STATUS reflects unsupported.

objective: Validate write to read-only command sets unsupported/write command error.
stimulus_summary: Send OUT write to PROT_CAP or DEVICE_STATUS.
success_measurement: DEVICE_STATUS.PROTOCOL_ERROR 0x01 then clear-on-read; no state corruption.

objective: Validate unsupported non-CMS parameter error.
stimulus_summary: Write RECOVERY_CTRL with reserved image selection or other reserved parameter values excluding CMS-index tests.
success_measurement: DEVICE_STATUS.PROTOCOL_ERROR 0x02 is set and clears on read; command side effects suppressed.

objective: Validate unsupported CMS index behavior separately from generic unsupported parameters.
stimulus_summary: Select CMS index above PROT_CAP CMS count in RECOVERY_CTRL and/or INDIRECT_FIFO_CTRL.
success_measurement: RECOVERY_STATUS reports invalid component address space or FIFO status reports unsupported region per selected command; no data accepted.
spec_source_traceability: OCP v1.1 sec 8.2.5; sec 9.2 RECOVERY_STATUS and INDIRECT_FIFO_STATUS

objective: Validate incorrect write length error.
stimulus_summary: Write RECOVERY_CTRL and INDIRECT_FIFO_CTRL with too few and too many bytes.
success_measurement: DEVICE_STATUS.PROTOCOL_ERROR 0x03; command side effects suppressed.

objective: Validate USB read length rule.
stimulus_summary: Issue PROT_CAP/STATUS reads with wLength not equal to wMaxRdTransferSize.
success_measurement: Checker expects the pre-declared design policy: STALL/non-success or protocol-error indication; in all cases no state corruption and next legal read succeeds.
dependencies: Expected response policy must be finalized before implementation

objective: Validate USB write limit rule.
stimulus_summary: Issue INDIRECT_FIFO_DATA with wLength greater than wMaxWrTransferSize.
success_measurement: Checker expects the pre-declared design policy: STALL/non-success or protocol-error indication; FIFO indices and image data remain unchanged.
dependencies: Expected response policy must be finalized before implementation

objective: Validate OCP PROTOCOL_ERROR 0x04 policy for payload checksum/CRC over USB.
stimulus_summary: If implementation defines an OCP-level checksum error trigger, inject it; otherwise prove USB packet CRC errors do not falsely set OCP PROTOCOL_ERROR 0x04.
success_measurement: Either DEVICE_STATUS.PROTOCOL_ERROR 0x04 is set for the defined OCP-level trigger, or 0x04 is explicitly covered as not applicable to USB EP0 command payloads.
spec_source_traceability: OCP v1.1 sec 9.1; OCP v1.1 sec 8.5 lines 77-79
dependencies: Design policy for OCP-level CRC on USB

objective: Validate small FIFO image push.
stimulus_summary: Program IMAGE_SIZE small, push one small image chunk, poll status.
success_measurement: FIFO WRITE_INDEX matches size; firmware drains; DEVICE_STATUS reaches RECOVERY_PENDING.

objective: Validate minimum nonzero image size.
stimulus_summary: Program IMAGE_SIZE 1 dword and push 4 bytes.
success_measurement: FIFO and firmware handle minimum image; expected auth failure or controlled completion if not a valid image.

objective: Validate non-4B-multiple final write handling.
stimulus_summary: Program IMAGE_SIZE rounded to dwords; push final chunk with non-4B byte count if allowed by implementation.
success_measurement: Head/write index rounds as specified; data content not shifted.

objective: Validate chunk exactly at wMaxWrTransferSize.
stimulus_summary: Push INDIRECT_FIFO_DATA chunks exactly equal to advertised max write size.
success_measurement: All chunks accepted; WRITE_INDEX increments by max-sized chunks.

objective: Validate FIFO boundary and payload_available behavior around 256 bytes.
stimulus_summary: Push image with chunks that reach exactly 256B and cross into next service window.
success_measurement: payload_available asserts at expected threshold; firmware drains; indices update correctly.

objective: Validate large image requiring many EP0 OUT transfers.
stimulus_summary: Program large IMAGE_SIZE and push multiple chunks less/equal wMaxWrTransferSize.
success_measurement: All bytes drained in order; final status reaches pending/activation path.
spec_source_traceability: OCP v1.1 sec 8.2.5; Caliptra.md streaming flow

objective: Validate mismatch where transferred payload is shorter than programmed image size.
stimulus_summary: Program IMAGE_SIZE larger than bytes sent; stop sending and poll status/timeout.
success_measurement: Device remains awaiting image or reports controlled failure; no false RECOVERY_PENDING.

objective: Validate mismatch where host sends more payload than programmed image size.
stimulus_summary: Program IMAGE_SIZE smaller than bytes sent; send extra FIFO_DATA.
success_measurement: Extra data rejected/ignored per design; no buffer overrun; error/status captured.

objective: Validate FIFO full or near-full flow control.
stimulus_summary: Push without allowing firmware drain or constrain drain to fill FIFO.
success_measurement: Device returns NACK/non-success or status indicates full without corrupting indices.

objective: Validate INDIRECT_FIFO_CTRL reset clears stale state between recovery stages.
stimulus_summary: Program image size, write partial data, assert FIFO reset, read FIFO_STATUS, then start next stage with different payload.
success_measurement: WRITE_INDEX/READ_INDEX return to reset/empty values; stale bytes are not visible to next stage; new image size takes effect.
spec_source_traceability: OCP v1.1 sec 9.2 INDIRECT_FIFO_CTRL; Caliptra.md multi-stage sequence
dependencies: Reset bit and scoreboard flush support

objective: Validate Caliptra-core recovery image path over USB.
stimulus_summary: Transfer a valid Caliptra-core image via FIFO CMS, activate, and allow firmware authentication/boot.
success_measurement: Caliptra firmware reports expected success; statuses progress through pending/booting/success.

objective: Validate SoC manifest/config payload stage over USB.
stimulus_summary: After Caliptra image stage, respond to image-index/status request with SoC manifest/config payload.
success_measurement: Firmware consumes/validates payload; status requests next stage without stale FIFO data.

objective: Validate MCU recovery image path over USB.
stimulus_summary: Transfer valid MCU image after required prior stages; Caliptra authorizes and writes MCU SRAM; MCU starts.
success_measurement: MCU writes pass mailbox; Caliptra status indicates successful handoff.

objective: Validate full Caliptra-core, SoC manifest/config, MCU multi-stage sequence.
stimulus_summary: Run complete ordered sequence with status polling between stages and activation points.
success_measurement: All stages occur in order; image index increments correctly; MCU pass mailbox ends sim.

objective: Validate production-ROM-compatible USB recovery path.
stimulus_summary: Run USB recovery using production ROM configuration analogous to I3C prod ROM streaming boot.
success_measurement: Production flow reaches expected pass/fail marker without test-ROM-only assumptions.
spec_source_traceability: I3C prod ROM precedent; Caliptra.md streaming boot
dependencies: Confirm prod ROM USB recovery firmware path exists

objective: Randomize image size and chunk partitioning within legal limits.
stimulus_summary: Constrained random IMAGE_SIZE and FIFO_DATA chunks across many seeds.
success_measurement: Scoreboard byte model and firmware drain match all seeds; coverage bins close.
spec_source_traceability: I3C rand streaming precedent; OCP v1.1 sec 8.2.5

objective: Validate activation before complete image is handled gracefully.
stimulus_summary: Program IMAGE_SIZE, send partial image, write RECOVERY_CTRL activate 0x0F.
success_measurement: Device refuses activation or remains awaiting image; no boot of incomplete payload.

objective: Validate bad image authentication failure reporting.
stimulus_summary: Transfer syntactically complete image with invalid signature/hash and activate.
success_measurement: RECOVERY_STATUS reports the design's authentication-error code specifically; DEVICE_STATUS reports corresponding boot-failure/error state; system remains controlled.
spec_source_traceability: OCP v1.1 sec 7.7 and 9.2 RECOVERY_STATUS; Caliptra.md lines 1567-1570
dependencies: Invalid-auth image artifact and exact expected status code

objective: Validate malformed or invalid image format failure separately from authentication failure.
stimulus_summary: Transfer malformed image with correct byte count but invalid structure, then activate.
success_measurement: RECOVERY_STATUS reports the design's invalid/failed image code specifically; no execution handoff occurs.
spec_source_traceability: OCP v1.1 sec 7.7 and 9.2 RECOVERY_STATUS; Caliptra.md recovery failure behavior
dependencies: Malformed image artifact and exact expected status code

objective: Validate subsystem reset while USB configured but recovery idle.
stimulus_summary: Enumerate; assert subsystem reset; deassert; reinitialize firmware and USB if required.
success_measurement: Registers reset; device re-enumerates; mandatory OCP commands available after reconfig.

objective: Validate subsystem reset during image push.
stimulus_summary: Start FIFO image push, assert subsystem reset mid-chunk or between chunks.
success_measurement: No stale partial image accepted after reset; recovery restarts cleanly.

objective: Validate USB bus reset during OCP IN read.
stimulus_summary: Start PROT_CAP/DEVICE_STATUS read and issue bus reset during transfer.
success_measurement: Transfer non-success; post-reset enumeration required; no deadlock.
dependencies: VIP bus reset during active transfer

objective: Validate USB bus reset during OCP OUT FIFO write.
stimulus_summary: Start FIFO_DATA OUT and reset during DATA stage.
success_measurement: Failed OUT bytes are not counted as committed; post-reset state clean.

objective: Validate surprise removal during RECOVERY_CTRL activation and firmware handoff.
stimulus_summary: Transfer complete image, write activate, disconnect before/during firmware observation.
success_measurement: System either completes internally or reports controlled retry/reset path; no hang.

objective: Validate surprise removal during FIFO_DATA first middle and last chunks.
stimulus_summary: Disconnect during FIFO_DATA transfer across first, middle, and final chunk variants, then reconnect/reset per policy.
success_measurement: Failed transfer does not partially commit bytes beyond documented policy; post-recovery flow restarts or resumes as specified without stale FIFO state.
spec_source_traceability: User request; USB 2.0 sec 8.5.3; OCP v1.1 sec 8.5.5
dependencies: Phase-specific disconnect hook and reset policy

objective: Validate packet loss/retry handling during OCP class transfers.
stimulus_summary: Drop or force missing packet/handshake during OCP read/write where VIP supports it.
success_measurement: Transfer retries or fails cleanly; subsequent mandatory command succeeds.

objective: Validate excessive NAK/retry timeout behavior.
stimulus_summary: Force repeated NAK/no-response on IN or OUT transaction.
success_measurement: Host reports timeout/non-success; device not corrupted; recovery via reset works.

objective: Validate unexpected PID type during OCP control transfer.
stimulus_summary: Inject invalid/unexpected PID in token/data/handshake phase.
success_measurement: DUT/VIP detects error; no side effects from failed transfer; recovery path works.
spec_source_traceability: User request; USB 2.0 packet transaction rules

objective: Run long randomized USB OCP recovery regression over legal and negative scenarios.
stimulus_summary: Randomize commands, legal/illegal lengths, image sizes, chunking, reset/removal insertion under constraints.
success_measurement: No hangs; expected-negative tests self-identify; coverage targets close.

objective: Validate multiple recovery sessions without full simulator restart.
stimulus_summary: Run full recovery, reset/re-enumerate, run another recovery with different image size/order.
success_measurement: Second session not affected by stale FIFO/status/descriptor state.
spec_source_traceability: OCP v1.1 recovery process; reset requirements

objective: Close OCP Recovery v1.1 protocol conformance checklist for USB implementation.
stimulus_summary: Map every checklist item to passing test, waiver, or infrastructure gap.
success_measurement: Checklist complete; mandatory uncovered items are zero or explicitly waived.
